name: Pork Loin with Sauerkraut and Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and drain sauerkraut.
2. Put pork on rack in shallow baking pan. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Bake in preheated slow oven (325°F) for 2 hours.
4. Combine tomato sauce, 1/2 cup molasses, vinegar, and sauerkraut. Pour off excess fat from roast and cover with sauerkraut mixture. Bake an additional 45 minutes or until meat reaches 165°F.
5. Combine remaining 1/4 cup molasses with apples, butter, lemon juice, and cinnamon. Cook over low heat for 20 minutes.
6. Serve pork and sauerkraut on platter surrounded by apple slices.
